name: Finexia Financial Group Limited
summary: Finexia Financial Group Limited provides trading, advisory, and lending services in Australia. It operates through two segments Mejority Capital, and Smart Money Company. It offers share trading facility; loan facilitation; and project finance value added services for property developers, such as pre-sale underwriting, pre-sale shortfall bond, joint venture, and builder selection services. The company also provides cavet loans; bridging loans; first and second mortgage, development financing, mezzanine funding, and property financing services, as well as licensing and fund management services. The company was formerly known as Mejority Capital Limited and changed its name to Finexia Financial Group Limited in September 2020. Finexia Financial Group Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.
